name: batuta-ecosystem
description: Batuta AI marketplace — contract-based delegation, SDD pipeline, and Colombian business expertise for Claude Code.

plugins.name: batuta-dots
plugins.description: Batuta core ecosystem: 17 essential skills + 8 agents (5 workers + 3 reviewers), SDD pipeline (SPRINT/COMPLETO), contract-based agent hiring. Domain skills (ICG, ADK, compliance, etc.) are project-provisioned via /batuta-init and /batuta-sync.
